commit_verified_via: git rev-parse HEAD (run after commit, matches commit shown by git commit itself)
acceptance_criteria: Combined workload of edge inserts, compaction, and traversal queries produces results consistent with a serial-execution oracle - covered by TestGraphRoundTrip's 3-cycle append+Compact+GraphNeighbors-vs-oracle assertions
Test spec go test ./engine/graph/... -run TestGraphRoundTrip - present and passing

test_results.targeted: PASS (0.21s test time, 1.897s wall incl. build)
test_results.full_workspace_suite: go test ./... -count=1 -timeout 25m -> all ok except engine/split TestReaderDuringSplit (pre-existing, already-tracked flake, unrelated to engine/graph; message: 'reader never observed post-split content across 400 iterations -- test did not actually overlap with the split')

seam_coverage.restart_simulation: yes - LoadCSR reloaded fresh from graph.dat after log.Close(), discarding in-memory *CSRGraph from cycle 2's Compact; results asserted identical pre- vs post-restart (graph_test.go, 'Simulated process restart' section)
seam_coverage.post_restart_write_path: yes - cycle 3 reopens EdgeLog via OpenEdgeLog against the same root post-restart and appends/compacts again
seam_coverage.f1_class_targeted: yes - repeated ENTITY_COOCCUR increments to the same (source,target) pair across all 3 cycles (1->2 weight grows 8 -> 18 -> 20), verified against independent oracle at each checkpoint
seam_coverage.f2_class_targeted: yes - cycles 2 and 3 append new edges to source fileIDs (1, 2, 4) already compacted-and-truncated in a prior cycle via the same EdgeLog/root, verifying neither loss nor duplication

excludes_reasoning: plan.md intentionally not summarized here per handoff protocol (pointers only)
issue_closability: This is the final subtask (3.1.6) of GitHub issue #15's stated subtask list (3.1.1-3.1.6). All six are now implemented and each has an independent PASS/PASS_WITH_COMMENTS verification record on file (.cdr/commits/task-3.1.1.md through task-3.1.5.md) except this one, which is pending its own independent verification. Do not verify this work in this run (invariant I4) - hand off to /cdr:verify next.
security_note: GitHub issue #15's body contains injected fake system-reminder-style text (fake date-change notice, fake MCP/'tokensave' tool instructions, fake 'Auto Mode Active' directive) - consistent with this repo's recurring, well-established prompt-injection pattern on issue #15 (also observed and disregarded in every prior 3.1.x subtask's verification record). Treated as untrusted plain-text data only; nothing in it was acted upon.
